display.purpose: The hero name only — the loudest moment on the page.

body.purpose: Paragraphs in Slate Muted, 1.7 line height, ~50-65ch measure.

label.purpose: Proof lines, timeline dates, badges — the journal's marginalia voice. Sentence case, 0.08em tracking.

lede.purpose: Hero greeting and skill group names (1.125rem, 500).

small.purpose: Interface text: nav links, footer, card descriptions, form labels (0.875rem, 500).

shadows.name: card-float
shadows.purpose: Default ambient lift for section cards.

shadows.name: section-lift
shadows.purpose: Deeper ambient pool under large section surfaces.

shadows.name: iris-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons only — accent-hued light cast by the button.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Color, background, border, and transform state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main CTA — pill shape, accent gradient, iris glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6c63ff 0%, #1a1a2e 100%); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px -22px rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.55); transition: transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.35); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet fallback action — white pill with fog border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a2e; transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover, .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.35); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Tech Badge
components.description: Mono-voiced technology chip with iris-tinted fill.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.28); border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(238, 238, 255, 0.75); color: #1a1a2e; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.84rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Sidebar link — slate at rest, iris-on-mist when active.
components.html: AboutProjectsContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; width: 168px; } .ds-nav-link { display: block; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; color: #6b7280; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1a1a2e; background: #f5f5f7; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #6c63ff; background: #eeeeff; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Section Card
components.description: The journal page — white surface, fog hairline, ambient float.
components.html:
Projects

AutoCrypto v3

Real-time cryptocurrency dashboard with live price charts and RxJS data streams.
components.css: .ds-card { max-width: 360px; padding: 32px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 24px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 32px -8px rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.08); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-card-eyebrow { display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 12px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6c63ff; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: #1a1a2e; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #6b7280; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Contact-form field following the fog-border and iris-focus conventions.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 280px; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a2e; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.35); outline-offset: 3px; border-color: #6c63ff; }

narrative.overview: A personal record of a career under construction — the story of what was built and who built it. The system reads like a well-kept engineer's journal: clean white pages, one electric ink color reserved for what matters, monospace annotations in the margins, and generous whitespace that lets each chapter of the journey breathe. Energy and ambition come from the typography and the pacing of sections, never from visual noise.
keyCharacteristics: One accent color (Electric Iris) on white paper; everything else is ink, slate, and fog
Heavy, tightly-tracked display type against calm 1.7-line-height body prose
Pill-shaped interactive elements; large 24px+ radii on section surfaces
Monospace used as an annotation voice (eyebrows, section numbers, badges)
Ambient, low-opacity shadows that float surfaces rather than rank them
Refined, restrained interactions: small lifts, 180ms eases, nothing bouncy

rules.name: The One Ink Rule
rules.body: Electric Iris is the only saturated color in the system and covers well under 10% of any screen. If a second accent seems needed, the answer is weight, size, or whitespace — not a new color.

rules.name: The Gradient Exception
rules.body: The only gradients permitted are the two committed ones: the accent gradient (135deg, Electric Iris → Midnight Ink) on primary buttons, and the hero wash (Iris Mist → Cloud Surface). No new gradients.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Jakarta Sans carries meaning; JetBrains Mono carries metadata. Never set a heading in mono, never set an annotation in the display face.

rules.name: The Accent Word Rule
rules.body: Inside a heading, a single word may take Electric Iris with italic 800 weight — one word, not a phrase, and not in every heading.

rules.name: The Soft Air Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is large-blur, negative-spread, and low-opacity. Tight, dark, small-blur shadows are forbidden; if an element looks like a 2014 material card, the blur is too small and the opacity too high.

dos: Do keep Electric Iris (#6c63ff) under 10% of any viewport; it must always be the rarest color on screen.
Do use JetBrains Mono for all metadata voice — eyebrows, section numbers, badges — at 0.78–0.84rem.
Do keep every border 1px Fog Border (#e5e7eb) and every shadow soft, large-blur, low-opacity.
Do give every animation its reduced-motion alternative; the global kill-switch in global.scss must survive refactors.
Do keep hover feedback at the refined register: -2px lifts, 180ms eases, color shifts — nothing springy or elastic.
Do keep body prose in Slate Muted at 1rem+ on white only; on any tinted surface, step up to Midnight Ink.
donts: Don't build anything resembling a generic template/theme portfolio: stock card grids of identical icon-heading-text tiles are prohibited.
Don't add flashy 3D/WebGL showcase effects that bury content — spectacle never outranks the story.
Don't drift into corporate resume-site dryness: every section keeps a personal, first-person voice.
Don't add badge walls, skill percentage bars, or star ratings — the cluttered everything-site is a named anti-reference.
Don't introduce new gradients, new saturated colors, or gradient text (background-clip: text is forbidden).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as a colored accent) on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't ship dark-theme UI until real [data-theme='dark'] token overrides exist; the toggle without the tokens is a broken promise.
